message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 2
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontSize 14
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 2
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment left
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment top
skinparam participantHorizontalAlignment left
skinparam participantVerticalSpacing 20
skinparam participantHorizontalSpacing 20
skinparam participantMinWidth 100
skinparam participantMaxWidth 300
skinparam participantMinHeight 50
skinparam participantMaxHeight 200
skinparam participantMinPadding 5
skinparam participantMaxPadding 20
skinparam participantMinMargin 5
skinparam participantMaxMargin 20
skinparam participantMinBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantMaxBorderThickness 5
skinparam participantMinCornerRadius 0
skinparam participantMaxCornerRadius 10
skinparam participantMinShadowing false
skinparam participantMaxShadowing true
skinparam participantMinAlignment left
skinparam participantMaxAlignment right
skinparam participantMinVerticalAlignment top
skinparam participantMaxVerticalAlignment bottom
skinparam participantMinHorizontalAlignment left
skinparam participantMaxHorizontalAlignment right
skinparam participantMinVerticalSpacing 10
skinparam participantMaxVerticalSpacing 30
skinparam participantMinHorizontalSpacing 10
skinparam participantMaxHorizontalSpacing 30
skinparam participantMinMinWidth 50
skinparam participantMaxMinWidth 150
skinparam participantMinMaxWidth 200
skinparam participantMaxMaxWidth 400
skinparam participantMinMinHeight 30
skinparam participantMaxMinHeight 70
skinparam participantMinMaxHeight 100
skinparam participantMaxMaxHeight 300
skinparam participantMinMinPadding 2
skinparam participantMaxMinPadding 8
skinparam participantMinMaxPadding 10
skinparam participantMaxMaxPadding 30
skinparam participantMinMinMargin 2
skinparam participantMaxMinMargin 8
skinparam participantMinMaxMargin 10
skinparam participantMaxMaxMargin 30
skinparam participantMinMinBorderThickness 0
skinparam participantMaxMinBorderThickness 2
skinparam participantMinMaxBorderThickness 3
skinparam participantMaxMaxBorderThickness 6
skinparam participantMinMinCornerRadius 0
skinparam participantMaxMinCornerRadius 3
skinparam participantMinMaxCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantMaxMaxCornerRadius 15
skinparam participantMinMinShadowing false
skinparam participantMaxMinShadowing false
skinparam participantMinMaxShadowing true
skinparam participantMaxMaxShadowing true
skinparam participantMinMinAlignment left
skinparam participantMaxMinAlignment left
skinparam participantMinMaxAlignment center
skinparam participantMaxMaxAlignment right
skinparam participantMinMinVerticalAlignment top
skinparam participantMaxMinVerticalAlignment top
skinparam participantMinMaxVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantMaxMaxVerticalAlignment bottom
skinparam participantMinMinHorizontalAlignment left
skinparam participantMaxMinHorizontalAlignment left
skinparam participantMinMaxHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam participantMaxMaxHorizontalAlignment right
skinparam participantMinMinVerticalSpacing 5
skinparam participantMaxMinVerticalSpacing 15
skinparam participantMinMaxVerticalSpacing 20
skinparam participantMaxMaxVerticalSpacing 40
skinparam participantMinMinHorizontalSpacing 5
skinparam participantMaxMinHorizontalSpacing 15
skinparam participantMinMaxHorizontalSpacing 20
skinparam participantMaxMaxHorizontalSpacing 40

actor "Service" as Service
participant "Access token guard" as Guard
box "Auth microservice" #9ACD32
    participant "Session module" as Session
    participant "Auth module" as Auth
end box

Service -> Guard: request
activate Guard
Guard -> Guard: get headers
Guard -> Guard: check authentication header existence

alt [Authentication header is undefined]
    Guard --> Service: 401
else
    Guard -> Guard: get access token from header
    Guard -> Auth: validate access token
    activate Auth
    Auth --> Guard: result of validation
    deactivate Auth

    alt [Access token is Invalid]
        Guard --> Service: 401
    else
        Guard -> Auth: get embedded client id from access token
        activate Auth
        Auth -> Auth: extract id
        alt [Client id is missing]
            Auth --> Guard: error
            Guard --> Service: 401
        else
            Auth --> Guard: client id
            deactivate Auth
            Guard -> Guard: modify request with client id
            Guard --> Service: modified request
        end
    end
end
deactivate Guard

@enduml
